creator: hollywar@holywar.net
text:
>Submitter-Id:   hollywar
>Originator:     Junseon Oh
>Organization:   Holynet
>Confidential:   no
>Synopsis:       Re:ports/13569 korean/engdic fixed..
>Severity:       non-critical
>Priority:       low
>Category:       ports
>Release:        FreeBSD 3.2-STABLE i386
>Class:          change-request
>Environment: 

	

>Description: 

* fixed archive
* fixed PLIST
* fixed md5
* update version
* pipe removed. (/tmp used)
* pkg_add problem fixed

>How-To-Repeat: 

	

>Fix: 
	
	



diff -urN engdic.org/Makefile engdic/Makefile
--- engdic.org/Makefile	Mon Sep  6 02:51:29 1999
+++ engdic/Makefile	Mon Sep  6 02:51:57 1999
@@ -1,13 +1,13 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:    engdic-0.1
-# Version required:     0.1
+# New ports collection makefile for:    engdic-0.2
+# Version required:     0.2
 # Date created:         3 Jun 1999
 # Whom:                 Oh Junseon <hollywar@mail.holywar.net>
 #
 # $FreeBSD: ports/korean/engdic/Makefile,v 1.2 1999/08/30 12:08:42 peter Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=	engdic-0.1
-PKGNAME=	ko-engdic-0.1
+DISTNAME=	engdic-0.2
+PKGNAME=	ko-engdic-0.2
 CATEGORIES=	korean deskutils
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp.holywar.net/pub/engdic/ \
 		ftp://ftp.kr.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD-kr/distfiles/
diff -urN engdic.org/files/md5 engdic/files/md5
--- engdic.org/files/md5	Mon Sep  6 02:51:29 1999
+++ engdic/files/md5	Mon Sep  6 02:54:17 1999
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (engdic-0.1.tar.gz) = 2c76671260ff0c7aee9ff772606d927b
+MD5 (engdic-0.2.tar.gz) = 750867ceaff3840da9db2b3a62560c80
diff -urN engdic.org/pkg/PLIST engdic/pkg/PLIST
--- engdic.org/pkg/PLIST	Mon Sep  6 02:51:29 1999
+++ engdic/pkg/PLIST	Mon Sep  6 02:55:09 1999
@@ -1,4 +1,5 @@
 bin/engdic
+bin/edic
 share/engdic/a.dic.gz
 share/engdic/b.dic.gz
 share/engdic/c.dic.gz
